name: Christian Ferry, Campaign Manager, Lindsey Graham 2016
subject: Would you like a Bumper Sticker?
body:
| |

---
---
|
Friend,

Can I put some bumper stickers in the mail to you today?

Let me explain. Our campaign just printed thousands of bumper stickers, and I want to send you a few so you can show your support for Senator Graham on your vehicle!

After your vehicle is appropriately sporting a #Graham2016 sticker, I hope you will distribute a few extra to your friends and family.

**Your donation of at least $10 will help us cover the printing and shipping costs.[Please follow this link to chip in $10 or more and we will put 5 stickers in the mail to you right away!](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29870093:28672618023:m:1:877327319:809775F183EB9E88A4FDD890E189CC28:r)**

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29870093:28672618023:m:1:877327319:809775F183EB9E88A4FDD890E189CC28:r)
Senator Graham is ready to be Commander-in-Chief on day one and with your immediate support he will win our party's nomination. [**Will you show your support for Senator Graham by chipping in $10 or more right now?**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29870093:28672618023:m:1:877327319:809775F183EB9E88A4FDD890E189CC28:r)

Christian Ferry
Campaign Manager
Lindsey Graham 2016

P.S. Senator Graham is ready to lead on day one, but he won't be able to get to the White House without your support. [**Your immediate donation of $10 or more will allow our campaign to share Senator Graham's message of strength and security with people in the early voting states of Iowa, New Hampshire, and South Carolina. Plus, we will mail you a package of 5 bumper stickers when you make an instant donation right now!**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29870093:28672618023:m:1:877327319:809775F183EB9E88A4FDD890E189CC28:r)

[](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/29870093:28672618023:m:1:877327319:809775F183EB9E88A4FDD890E189CC28:r) |

| Paid for by Lindsey Graham 2016

---

This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com)
You were added to the system April 14, 2015.
For more information [click here](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWl-MhomxN). [Update your preferences](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWl-MhomxN)
[Unsubscribe](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWl-MhomxN) | [Unsubscribe via email](mailto:unsub-28672618023-echo3-B1DCC0F5D8953DF97456C6F0321E9DAB@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings)

name: Ben Carson
subject: A special request
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Carson America, Inc
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29916069:28674644105:m:1:876315805:677A199113880BC9C7DC4FB2679C7003:r)
---

Peter,

While this campaign is national in scope, it will start off in February as a series of state-by-state contests in early-voting states like Iowa, New Hampshire, South Carolina and Nevada.

**The good news is that even if you don't live in one of the early states, you can still help.**

On Monday, I will be in early-voting South Carolina to file my paperwork and formally add my name to the 2016 "First in the South" presidential primary ballot.

The bulk of that paperwork is a check for $40,000.

I'd like to invite you to help -- and to be a part of history.

**For the first 1,000 people willing to donate $40 or more to help put me on the ballot, I will include your name with our filing on Monday.**

[**Will you add your name by making a donation to our South Carolina Victory Fund now?**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29916069:28674644105:m:1:876315805:677A199113880BC9C7DC4FB2679C7003:r)**
**
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29916069:28674644105:m:1:876315805:677A199113880BC9C7DC4FB2679C7003:r)
---
From the beginning, this has been a grassroots campaign fueled not by lobbyists or special interests but by everyday, hard-working Americans -- and that's exactly how it should be.

Monday's filing in South Carolina is a very important first step for us, and [I hope you'll help out](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29916069:28674644105:m:1:876315805:677A199113880BC9C7DC4FB2679C7003:r).

Thanks for your support, your faith in me, and your faith in this great country.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

| | |
[](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29916069:28674644105:m:1:876315805:677A199113880BC9C7DC4FB2679C7003:r) [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29916070:28674644105:m:1:876315805:677A199113880BC9C7DC4FB2679C7003:r)
---
|
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29916071:28674644105:m:1:876315805:677A199113880BC9C7DC4FB2679C7003:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29916072:28674644105:m:1:876315805:677A199113880BC9C7DC4FB2679C7003:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29916073:28674644105:m:1:876315805:677A199113880BC9C7DC4FB2679C7003:r) | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/29916074:28674644105:m:1:876315805:677A199113880BC9C7DC4FB2679C7003:r)
---|---|---|---
Make a donation | | Show your support for Ben on social media
Carson America, Inc | P.O. Box 26261 | Alexandria, VA 22313

| Paid for by Carson America, Inc.
---

name: Terry Sullivan, MarcoRubio.com
subject: Confirming their worst fears
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Marco Rubio for President
body:
Peter,
We've heard before from Democrats that the
Republican presidential candidate they're most afraid of is
Marco. They know his vision for a New American Century is exactly
the leadership Americans want, instead of the same ideas and
leaders from yesterday.
Now, a new poll* confirms their worst
fears! Take a look:

That's right. A non-partisan, university poll
shows Marco leading Hillary Clinton by 8 points in Ohio, 12
points in Florida, and 7 points in Pennsylvania.
Marco is Hillary Clinton's worst nightmare.
That means two things for you:

We need to be prepared for the Left-Wing
attack machine to step up its attacks against Marco and his
family -- and be ready to fight back!
We have to redouble our efforts to help
Marco win the Republican nomination.

You can help by clicking here right now and
donating $7 or more to our campaign, ensuring we have the
resources needed to succeed.
As this poll shows, the American people are
ready for Marco's leadership and vision for our country. We need
your help to make it happen!
Terry Sullivan
Campaign Manager
Marco Rubio for President

* This far out, we need to take polls with a
grain of salt, however, this demonstrates we do better against
Hillary Clinton than any other Republican and the American people
are ready for a new leader. Click here to donate $7 right now to
ensure we have the resources to win the nomination and take on
the Democrats' nominee.

Paid for by Marco Rubio for President

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Too many emails? Click here to receive updates less often:
https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

Unsubscribe: https://marcorubio.com/unsubscribe/?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com

PO Box 558701 | Miami, FL 33255-8701

name: Team McGinty
subject: Big endorsements
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
body:
"Democratic stalwarts quickly support McGinty's entry in U.S. Senate race"
- Pittsburgh Post-Gazette

Join the growing group of Democrats supporting Katie! Chip in now >>
https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/km-founding-member?refcode=20150821e&amount=10

Friend,

Our campaign to elect Katie to the U.S. Senate has had a HUGE start! She has already been endorsed by Governor Ed Rendell, Rep. Mike Doyle, Rep. Bob Brady, Pittsburgh Mayor Bill Peduto, the United Steelworkers, EMILY's List, and others. This early support from so many people is vital for what will be one of the biggest elections of 2016.

This big start is just that — the start. We need to keep it going. Will you pitch in $10 today to support Katie and ensure we beat Pat Toomey?

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/km-founding-member?refcode=20150821e&amount=10

Throughout her career in public service, Katie has proven time and again that she’s a determined fighter who gets tough things done. That’s why so many leaders from across Pennsylvania are already lining up to support our campaign.

These endorsements are big news, but to win it’s going to take everyone, especially people like you.

Contribute $10 right away to ensure we have the resources to build a strong campaign all across Pennsylvania.

https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/km-founding-member?refcode=20150821e&amount=10

This race is critical, not only to Pennsylvania, but to the country. This seat could determine who controls the Senate. We know Republicans are going to drop millions to defend Pat Toomey. With your help, we will beat them.

Thanks for your support,

Team McGinty

DONATE
https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/km-founding-member?refcode=20150821e&amount=10

----------------------------------------------
| Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate |
----------------------------------------------

If you no longer wish to receive updates from our campaign, please https://act.myngp.com/el/-5342009030602653696/7756625724424847360.

Katie McGinty for Senate
PO Box 22447
Philadelphia PA 19110 United States

name: Alex Lundry, Jeb2016.com
subject: 2016 Voter Response Survey: PENDING
body:
Friend -

I'm Alex Lundry, Chief Analytics Officer for Jeb 2016. I'm the guy who crunches the numbers, builds the models and breaks down our surveys.

So I wanted to make sure you saw Jeb's note below. This survey is crucial to understanding how best to move our campaign forward on the issues that matter the most.

We've set an ambitious goal of 10,000 responses to ensure our campaign's outreach can be as strong as possible. **But we 're still 24% short and, without your help, it will be extremely difficult to accomplish that.**

[**Can you take take a few minutes right now and complete your 2016 Voter Response Survey?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/vvybdkyzmghnrcrfnktbmnqcyynqzcdzbkjkhzcfkkvf_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Your answers are critical in helping elect Jeb the next President, so please, complete your survey now: [**Jeb2016.com/2016-Voter-Response-Survey**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/mqsgmtpvsdnlwjwcltkgslzjpplzvjmvgtbtnvjcttqq_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Thank you,

Alex Lundry
Chief Analytics Officer
Jeb 2016

**-- Begin Forwarded Message--
From: Jeb Bush
Date: August 18, 2015
Subject: **Short survey for Alex****

Alex -

It's been two months since I launched my bid for President. I've traveled the country, meeting with thousands of Americans from every walk of life, and showing them my heart.

It may be awhile until we get a chance to meet on the campaign trail, but I want to hear from you today. [**Will you take a couple of minutes out of your day and share which issues matter most to you, and what you need from your next president by filling out your 2016 Voter Response Survey?**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/hqhrjsfpmwczndnvzsgrmzldffzlpdjprshscpdvssqb_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

You may not know this, but as Governor, I spent 30 hours a week reading and responding to emails from Floridians. Your thoughts, your opinions and your story matter to me. They always have, that's why I want you to fill out this survey: [**Jeb2016.com/2016-Voter-Response-Survey**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/xvblkpcqsbrtgygdtpmlstnycctnqykqlpjprqydppvp_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

In the coming days we'll compile the results, and I look forward to seeing your feedback.

Together, we will take command of our future again in this country.

But this only happens together. This is a road I cannot travel alone, I need your help, your guidance, and with that, we will all rise.

Thank you, Alex, and I look forward to reading your response: [**Jeb2016.com/2016-Voter-Response-Survey**](http://click1.email.jeb2016.com/gyrqskmpntrdwfwcdkhqndjfmmdjpfspqklkrpfckkyr_tcmvvjpw.html?a=62e094b3-a1ea-49d7-b595-267b8a1be5f1)

Jeb
Paid for by Jeb 2016, Inc.
Jeb 2016, Inc. PO Box 440641 Miami, FL 33144
[Unsubscribe](http://www.email.jeb2016.com/Unsub.do?a=u&e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&mid=3219&sid=DB49C865-0E01-4FD8-AE99-ACEBCD4745CE&rid=55890&lid=18)

We've set an ambitious goal of 10,000 responses to ensure our campaign's outreach can be as strong as possible. But we 're still 24% short and, without your help, it will be extremely difficult to accomplish that.
